overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk underground market and transit hub from Cyberpunk 2077. The player ascends concrete stairs and navigates through neon-lit industrial corridors populated with vendors, digital billboards, and pedestrians, eventually emerging into an open urban area beneath massive highway overpasses at dusk.

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters main underground concourse area

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide concrete staircase with metal railings, approaching a busy underground area

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal handrails leading upward
concrete wall covered in black graffiti tags and street art
cyan neon sign with Japanese characters reading '空室あり' (vacancy available)
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a concrete stairwell in an industrial underground facility. The camera ascends the stairs, passing graffiti-covered walls and under harsh fluorescent lighting, emerging into a larger concourse area at the top.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main concourse, passing by concrete pillars and small vendor stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall with glowing items on display

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete support pillars lining the walkway
illuminated vending machine with colorful advertisements
wooden table with food items and a heat lamp glowing orange

segments.scene_description: Walking through a bustling underground concourse with concrete pillars and industrial ceilings. Vendors operate small stalls along the sides while pedestrians move through the space. The lighting remains artificial with a distinct cyan-green neon hue.

scene_state.functional_zone: rest area with large digital advertising screen

events.description: approaching the large illuminated Arasaka billboard increases ambient light levels

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large digital billboard display, observing the seating area and advertisements

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a couch looking at their phone

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying Arasaka corporation advertisement with a soldier in red armor
dark leather couch positioned in front of the billboard
low table with trash and items scattered on it

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider rest area dominated by a massive digital billboard displaying an Arasaka advertisement. A worn couch and coffee table sit before the screen, while the camera moves past this display area toward a corridor marked with a yellow number 4.

agents.ego_description: walking through an industrial corridor with metal mesh ceilings, passing workers near a garage door

notable_agents.action: two workers in yellow safety vests standing guard near a large garage door

entered.detail: large yellow sign with black number 4 painted on the concrete wall
security mesh or grating covering the ceiling with pipes visible above
large industrial roll-up metal door with horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: Moving through a utilitarian industrial corridor with exposed pipes and a metal mesh ceiling. Workers in high-visibility vests stand near a large garage door as the camera passes by, heading toward an overlook area with a view outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: overlook balcony with view to street level

events.description: reaches the overlook railing revealing the city street and highway structure below

agents.ego_description: approaching the railing to look down at the street level, then turning to continue through the facility

notable_agents.action: two men leaning on the railing looking down at the street below

entered.detail: waist-high concrete barrier with metal rail providing view to lower level
large digital screen visible outside displaying advertisements
green metal barred gate blocking off a side corridor

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens to an overlook with a concrete railing providing a view down to the city street and highway infrastructure below. Two men stand at the railing observing the scene outside before the camera turns away toward a market area with metal security gates.

agents.ego_description: walking through a makeshift market area with clothing vendors and merchandise displays

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting near a clothing rack arranging merchandise

entered.detail: makeshift stall with hanging clothes and folded garments on tables
white dress form displaying clothing items
stacked boxes containing merchandise next to the stall

segments.scene_description: Navigating through an informal market area with clothing stalls, mannequins, and cardboard boxes of merchandise. The space has a makeshift feel with goods displayed under fluorescent lighting as the camera approaches a bright exit to the outside.

events.description: exits the underground facility into the open urban environment beneath highway overpasses
transition from artificial neon lighting to natural dusk light

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp exiting the building, emerging into the open city air beneath massive highway structures

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway interchange with multiple levels of roads
large digital billboard displaying 'HOLT' with a portrait advertisement
tall skyscrapers and urban structures visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the enclosed underground to a vast open urban space beneath towering highway overpasses. The lighting shifts from artificial cyan neon to the warm gray-blue of dusk. The camera descends a ramp toward street level, with the massive 'HOLT' billboard and multi-level highway infrastructure dominating the skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a sterile industrial facility into a sprawling, open-air urban hub at dusk. It begins by ascending a concrete stairwell under harsh fluorescent lights, emerging into a bustling underground concourse where the atmosphere shifts to a cyan-green neon hue amidst concrete pillars and vendor stalls. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a rest area dominated by a massive Arasaka digital billboard before transitioning through a utilitarian corridor of exposed pipes and workers in high-visibility vests. The scene then expands at an overlook railing providing a glimpse of the city below, leading the camera through a makeshift market of clothing stalls and mannequins toward a bright exit. Finally, the enclosed environment gives way to a vast urban expanse beneath towering highway overpasses, as the artificial neon lighting fades into the warm gray-blue of twilight under a massive Holt billboard.
